overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a dark forest trail at night, likely from a survival horror video game. The path is illuminated by a handheld torch as the player navigates through dense trees and underbrush along a winding dirt path.

events.description: handheld torch becomes visible on the left side, illuminating the path ahead

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously along a narrow dirt path through dense forest at night, using a torch to illuminate the winding trail ahead

entered.detail: narrow winding dirt trail covered with patches of grass and leaves
tall thin tree trunks with sparse foliage visible in the darkness
thick green vegetation and bushes lining the right side of the path
orange glowing torch held by the character, casting dynamic light on nearby vegetation

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily forward along a narrow dirt trail through a dense forest at night. Initially dark, a handheld torch appears around the 7-second mark on the left side, casting warm orange light on the path and surrounding vegetation. Tall trees flank both sides of the trail while thick underbrush lines the edges, creating an enclosed, atmospheric environment typical of survival horror games.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a pitch-black forest that gradually becomes illuminated by a handheld light source. It begins with a steady advance along a narrow dirt trail, where the surrounding environment is shrouded in deep darkness. As the camera progresses, a torch appears on the left, casting a warm orange glow that cuts through the gloom to reveal the texture of the path and nearby vegetation. The scene then expands to show tall trees flanking both sides of the trail, while the light exposes thick underbrush that creates an enclosed, oppressive atmosphere.
